title: LM Studio Provider — Local LLM Adapter for vSkill Eval
description: Add LM Studio (OpenAI-compatible local LLM server at http://localhost:1234/v1) as a first-class provider in the vskill eval engine, alongside the already-supported Ollama. Includes provider adapter (clone of OpenRouter path), health/model probe, UI selector entry, unit + integration tests, and a Playwright smoke test gated on endpoint availability.

scope.stack: Node 20 + TypeScript 5.7 + Vite 6 + React 19 + Tailwind 4 + Vitest 3 + Playwright
